question: Fill blank (1) in the passage.
passage: Last summer, our class went on a three-day school trip to a national park. Before the trip, we prepared everything carefully. Each student packed a _______ (1) with clothes, food and water. On the first day, we went on a long _______ (2) through the dense _______ (3). Our teacher encouraged us to _______ (4) the area and observe nature. Along the way, we saw different kinds of _______ (5), such as birds, insects and small animals. In the evening, we worked together to set up our _______ (6). After that, we made a _______ (7) and sat around it, telling stories and singing songs. When it became dark, we used a _______ (8) to see clearly. Then we got into our _______ (9) and went to sleep. It was an _______ (10) experience, and we learned a lot about nature and teamwork.
word_bank: backpack, explore, forest, tent, campfire, wildlife, hike, torch, sleeping bag, amazing
